user.title: Add a template device tracker
user.description: Create a device_tracker entity whose state, location and motion are computed from Jinja2 templates.

data_description.state: Optional. Returns 'home', 'not_home' or a zone name. If omitted, lat/lon drive the state via zone resolution.
data_description.latitude: Optional. Numeric latitude. Combine with longitude for GPS-style tracking.
data_description.altitude: Optional. Metres above sea level. Exposed as the 'altitude' state attribute.
data_description.speed: Optional. Speed in m/s (or whatever unit your source produces). Exposed as the 'speed' state attribute.
data_description.course: Optional. Heading in degrees (0-360). Exposed as the 'course' state attribute.
data_description.satellites: Optional. Number of GPS satellites in view. Exposed as the 'satellites' state attribute.
data_description.availability: Optional. Boolean expression; entity becomes unavailable when this is false.
data_description.source_type: Optional. Defaults to 'gps' when coordinates are present, else 'router'.
